zh.Gresham, Norfolk Co., England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷沙姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gresham於1455年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓時，他的父親James Gresham25歲，母親Lady Margaret Billingford18歲。他於1480年與Lady Alice Blythe在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1525年8月23日之後在英國諾福爾可霍爾特，埋葬在英國諾福爾可沃爾辛厄姆 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gresham于1455年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓时，他的父亲James Gresham25岁，母亲Lady Margaret Billingford18岁。他于1480年与Lady Alice Blythe在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1525年8月23日之后在英国諾福爾可霍爾特，埋葬在英国諾福爾可沃爾辛厄姆 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Gresham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from a place in Norfolk, so named from Old English græs, gærs ‘grass(land), pasturage’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure hemmed in by water’.

variants.name: Grisham
meanings: English: variant of   Gresham  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Gresham was born in 1455, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Gresham, was 25 and his mother, Lady Margaret Billingford, was 18. He married Lady Alice Blythe in 1480, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 23 August 1525, in Holt, Norfolk, England, and was buried in Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gresham est né en 1455, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Gresham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Billingford, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Blythe en 1480, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 23 août 1525, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Lady Alice Blythe nel 1480, nel Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 23 agosto 1525, nel Holt, Norfolk, England, e fu sepolto a Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Greshamが1455年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンで生まれた時，父James Greshamは25歳，母Lady Margaret Billingfordは18歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンでLady Alice Blytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1525年8月23日以後にイギリスノーフォルクホルトで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクワルシンガム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gresham(이)가 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Gresham(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Billingford(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 Lady Alice Blythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 8월 23일 이후 영국 노르폴크 홀트에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 월징함 애브브이에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Blythe em 1480, em Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gresham родился в 1455 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Gresham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Billingford, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Blythe в 1480 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 23 августа 1525 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности валсингхам эбби, норфолк, Англия.
